tool.name: Lix plugin API candidate B refined lifecycle
tool.install: frozen source snapshot in each isolated evaluation workspace

task: Implement and test the assigned lifecycle/descriptor, CSV reorder, or Excalidraw coupled-change and large-entity task

config.prompt_template: Implement and test the task at {task_path} in {isolated_workspace} using the frozen API at {candidate_api_path}

overrides.temperature: Codex collaboration agents do not expose temperature; 0 records the requested nominal setting, not a verified provider setting
overrides.tools: Codex functions.exec and collaboration.send_message replaced the pinned Claude Code tool list; apply_patch and shell execution were nested under functions.exec
overrides.mcp_servers: Codex does not expose per-agent MCP stripping; no MCP calls were observed in the scored transcripts
overrides.system_prompt: Codex collaboration agents use the Codex system/developer instructions and cannot run with no system prompt
overrides.mode: Codex workspace-write sandbox policy replaced bypassPermissions
overrides.max_turns: Codex collaboration agents do not expose a hard turn cap; 40 records the requested nominal limit
overrides.cohort_size: Targeted N=3 follow-up, one agent per high-risk scenario; not a replacement for an N=10+ cohort
overrides.metric_parser: Codex rollout JSONL was adapted deterministically: custom_tool_call plus function_call count as tool calls; task_complete timestamps provide duration; tool transport errors and post-end-turn user messages provide errors/interruptions

agents.success_reason: The log shows src/lib.rs was fully implemented and cargo test completed successfully with all 3 lifecycle, pagination/stable-ID, rename, and malformed-input tests passing.
first_3_commands:
sed -n '1,240p' TASK.md && printf '
-- files --
' && rg --files -g 'AGENTS.md' -g '!target' . .. | head -50 && printf '
-- api --
' && sed -n '1,260p' /private/tmp/lix-refined-ax-api/src/candidate_b_refined.rs

sed -n '261,620p' /private/tmp/lix-refined-ax-api/src/candidate_b_refined.rs && printf '
-- crate --
' && rg --files -g '!target' && printf '
-- manifest --
' && sed -n '1,200p' Cargo.toml

agents.success_reason: The log shows only isolated-crate files were modified, and cargo fmt --check plus cargo test --offline passed the durability, stable-ID, reconstruction, validation, and zero-page warm-render test.
The log records implementation edits followed by cargo fmt --check and cargo test --quiet succeeding with all 3 tests passed.
first_3_commands: pwd && rg --files -g 'AGENTS.md' -g 'TASK.md' -g 'Cargo.toml' -g '*.rs' | head -200 && sed -n '1,240p' TASK.md && sed -n '1,260p' /private/tmp/lix-refined-ax-api/src/candidate_b_refined.rs
sed -n '261,620p' /private/tmp/lix-refined-ax-api/src/candidate_b_refined.rs && sed -n '1,300p' src/lib.rs && cat Cargo.toml && find .. -name AGENTS.md -print

summary.common_first_command:
sed -n '1,240p' TASK.md && printf '
-- files --
' && rg --files -g 'AGENTS.md' -g '!target' . .. | head -50 && printf '
-- api --
' && sed -n '1,260p' /private/tmp/lix-refined-ax-api/src/candidate_b_refined.rs (1/3)
